summary: Vehicle Weight P0 Fixes - Iteration 197 PASSED. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: View Dialog now shows Gross, Tare, Net, Avg/Bag, Cash, Diesel, Remark fields correctly. Weighbridge settings endpoints working.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data (entry_id=501db432-048a-456f-91a1-bee12e258a94 with remark)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vehicle Weight P0 fixes verified. Key changes: (1) GET /api/vehicle-weight/{entry_id}/photos now returns gross_wt, tare_wt, remark, net_wt, tot_pkts fields. (2) GET/PUT /api/settings/weighbridge-host endpoints working for LAN config. (3) GET /api/weighbridge/live-weight returns disconnected status for web version. (4) View Dialog shows all fields: Gross (26,648 KG), Tare (20,000 KG), Net (6,648 KG), Avg/Bag (26.59 KG), Cash (1,000), Diesel (500), Remark ('Test remark - Paddy quality OK'). (5) Weighbridge Settings tab shows 'Serial Port configuration sirf Desktop App (Electron) mai available hai' for web version - LAN config UI available when accessed via LAN browser mode.

GET /api/weighbridge/live-weight structure - PASS (connected, weight, stable, timestamp)

issue_1_view_dialog_missing_fields.description: View Dialog was missing gross_wt, tare_wt, remark, and avg/bag fields
issue_1_view_dialog_missing_fields.verification: All fields now visible in View Dialog - Gross (26,648 KG), Tare (20,000 KG), Net (6,648 KG), Avg/Bag (26.59 KG), Remark ('Test remark - Paddy quality OK')

issue_2_lan_weighbridge_polling.description: LAN Weighbridge polling not working because local-server lacked /api/weighbridge/live-weight endpoint
issue_2_lan_weighbridge_polling.verification: Backend endpoints verified: GET /api/settings/weighbridge-host, PUT /api/settings/weighbridge-host, GET /api/weighbridge/live-weight all working. Web version returns disconnected status as expected.
